An interface for scheduling context in the `io.kestra.core.schedulers` package.

# Purpose
The `ScheduleContextInterface` is a Java interface within the `io.kestra.core.schedulers` package. It defines a contract for classes that implement it, but it does not specify any methods or fields. This interface provides narrow functionality as it serves as a marker or a placeholder for future development, allowing for polymorphic behavior in the scheduling context of the application. Implementing classes can be identified as part of the scheduling context without requiring specific method implementations.
